creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Still doesn't build: https://gist.github.com/91b613007dbab2f044d1f4438c02e396

If this is not critical, maybe you can disable doc build first, although it's not very recommended.
Also, it's unfortunately that we don't have our public port testing infra revived yet. Do you think you can setup a poudriere locally to test it?  I'm happy to help you to test, but it might be easier for you to get the quick response.
